course_title: ECONOMIC GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT IN SOUTHEAST ASIA
description: Evaluates economic development strategies in Southeast Asia and their implications for growth, distribution and environment. Students learn trade and development theory as well as specific knowledge of Southeast Asian economic development.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: A A E 101(215 prior to Fall 2024),ECON 101,111, or graduate/professional standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: A A E 101(215 prior to Fall 2024),ECON 101,111, or graduate/professional standing
